title: Window function + group by in subselect, rel2bin_project: Assertion `0' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table(id, name, value, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 10.5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()), (2, 'Bob', 20.0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()), (3, 'Charlie', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP());
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY name) AS row_num, name FROM (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table(ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_table(ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Test 1'), (2, 'Test 2'), (3, NULL);
key_bug_features: Window function with group by in subselect
